name: darpan
message:
Hello :)
I hope you’re doing well. I’m reaching out because I’m very interested in internship or junior IT opportunities at IT Connect. I have experience with SQL, Power BI, ServiceNow, and technical troubleshooting, and I’m currently based in Warsaw.

I would love to contribute to your team and would appreciate the chance to discuss any suitable openings.
Thank you for your time.
